name: RadarChart

props.name: activeDotProps
props.description: Props passed down to all active dots. Ignored if withDots={false} is set.

props.name: children
props.description: Additional components that are rendered inside recharts RadarChart component

props.name: data
props.description: Data used in the chart

props.name: dataKey
props.description: Key of the data object for axis values

props.name: dotProps
props.description: Props passed down to all dots. Ignored if withDots={false} is set.

props.name: gridColor
props.description: Controls color of the grid lines. By default, color depends on the color scheme.

props.name: legendProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts Legend component

props.name: polarAngleAxisProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts PolarAngleAxis component

props.name: polarGridProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts PolarGrid component

props.name: polarRadiusAxisProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts PolarRadiusAxis component

props.name: radarChartProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts RadarChart component

props.name: radarProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts Radar component

props.name: series
props.description: Determines which data should be consumed from the data array.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Controls color of all text elements. By default, color depends on the color scheme.

props.name: tooltipAnimationDuration
props.description: Tooltip position animation duration in ms

props.name: tooltipProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts Tooltip component

props.name: withDots
props.description: Determines whether dots should be displayed

props.name: withLegend
props.description: Determines whether the legend should be displayed

props.name: withPolarAngleAxis
props.description: Determines whether PolarAngleAxis component should be displayed

props.name: withPolarGrid
props.description: Determines whether PolarGrid component should be displayed

props.name: withTooltip
